overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The player moves along neon-lit sidewalks past futuristic skyscrapers, food vendors, and elevated highways while pedestrians and vehicles populate the streets.

events.description: passing underneath yellow-lit pedestrian bridge connecting buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and neon advertisements

entered.detail: illuminated walkway connecting two buildings with yellow neon lighting underneath
dominant dark glass tower rising in the distance between buildings
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall building with reflective glass windows and vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a crosswalk in a futuristic downtown district, moving forward along a concrete sidewalk. The camera passes under a yellow-lit pedestrian bridge while a tall black skyscraper dominates the center horizon. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead and vehicles pass on the right as neon billboards illuminate the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with food vendors and illuminated storefronts

events.description: approaching illuminated food cart with vendor standing beside it
passing through area with intense teal and orange neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor cart and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beside illuminated cart with umbrella

entered.detail: street vendor cart with orange umbrella and warm yellow neon lighting
teal neon sign with circular logo and japanese text
vertical advertisement showing a beverage bottle with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk, the scene features a prominent food cart with glowing neon lights on the left. The camera passes the 'Shinonome Chronos' teal neon sign and various illuminated advertisements. The tall skyscraper ahead grows larger as the pedestrian bridge recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning to highway interchange

events.description: passing large orange neon 'CALIENTE' sign on building facade
approaching elevated highway ramps with yellow structural lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past palm trees and large neon signs while approaching the highway structure

entered.detail: large orange neon sign spelling 'CALIENTE' on building corner
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge between walkway and street
multi-level highway interchange with yellow illuminated support structures

segments.scene_description: The street opens up with palm trees lining the sidewalk and the bright orange 'CALIENTE' neon sign marking a building corner. As the camera continues forward, the massive elevated highway ramps come into view ahead, with vehicles visible on the upper levels. The tall skyscraper remains visible in the distance between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: under elevated highway with active traffic

events.description: stepping off sidewalk curb onto the asphalt street surface
futuristic vehicle passing by on the right while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street under the elevated highway while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic boxy vehicle with headlights on driving past the crossing area

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway overhead
view of the road surface with lane markings and traffic flow

segments.scene_description: Moving under the massive elevated highway structure, the camera descends from the sidewalk onto the asphalt street. The space becomes semi-covered by the overhead ramps, with artificial lighting from street lamps and vehicle headlights illuminating the area. The camera crosses the street as futuristic vehicles pass by, with highway support columns now dominating the immediate surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from an open city sidewalk into the shadowed underbelly of a massive highway system. It begins at a crosswalk, moving forward under a yellow-lit pedestrian bridge toward a towering black skyscraper that dominates the horizon. As the camera continues along the concrete path, the environment becomes more vibrant, passing a glowing food cart and a teal Shinonome Chronos sign before the street opens up to reveal palm trees and a bright orange Caliente sign. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the looming architecture of elevated highway ramps, with the distant skyscraper remaining visible between the buildings. Finally, the camera descends from the sidewalk onto the asphalt street, moving beneath the heavy overhead ramps where artificial street lamps and vehicle headlights illuminate the space among massive support columns.
